title: Beach Slimes
body:
A Port of [Beach Slimes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/beach-slimes) by [sargunv](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sargunv) to Modern Versions of Minecraft.

![A Happy Blue Slime on a Beach](https://i.imgur.com/XqfExBN.png)

This mod adds wonderful blue slimes which can be commonly found on beaches. They tend to be on the smaller side vs regular slimes, but they do have a slightly higher slimeball drop rate.
